description: Create journal entries / vouchers, manual salary postings
preflight: GET /ledger/account to find account IDs for the relevant accounts
endpoints: POST /ledger/voucher — body: {date, description, postings:[{row:1, account:{id:ACCT_ID}, amountGross:AMOUNT, vatType:{id:VAT_ID}}, {row:2, ...}]}
common_errors: Row numbers must start at 1 (row 0 is system-reserved)
Account must be referenced by {id:NUMBER} not by name
Postings must balance (total debits = total credits)
For salary: 5000-series = salary cost, 2780 = withholding tax, 1920 = bank
tips: Positive amountGross = debit, negative = credit. Postings must sum to zero.
